description_long: This house is a large, stately residence set within a walled property, featuring a symmetrical front garden with a central fountain and manicured hedges. The main building has a series of steep gable roofs, multiple chimneys, and a prominent entryway flanked by columns and steps. The property includes a spacious driveway, a rectangular swimming pool with a deck, and several landscaped areas with trees and shrubs. The rear of the house opens to a large lawn, bordered by evenly spaced trees and a fence. The exterior walls are light-colored, with numerous windows arranged in regular patterns, and the roof is finished in a muted gray. Decorative elements such as topiary, planters, and a gated entrance enhance the sense of grandeur and formality.
description: A grand, gabled house with a formal front garden, central fountain, swimming pool, and extensive landscaping within a fenced property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical garden, central fountain, and driveway leading to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the swimming pool, deck area, and the length of the property with trees and fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large lawn, back façade with multiple windows, and the pool area with adjacent landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, garden, and the arrangement of trees along the property boundary.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, columns, and a decorative overhang, flanked by large windows and formal landscaping.
